documentation.description: Join set for waiting on a group of spawned runtime task handles.

simple_types.name: Join_Set
simple_types.code: type Join_Set (Max_Tasks : Positive) is limited private;

record_types.name: Join_Stats

subprograms.name: Add
subprograms.code:
function Add
  (Set    : in out Join_Set;
   Handle : Aion.Task_Handle.Task_Handle)
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Cancel_All
subprograms.code:
function Cancel_All
  (Set    : in out Join_Set;
   Reason : String := "join set cancelled")
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Join_All
Join_Next
